description: CSS page break properties: page-break-after, page-break-before, page-break-inside: avoid
visual_assertions: Section 1 content should appear on page 1
Section 2 ends with page-break-after, so Section 3 should begin at the top of a new page
Section 4 has page-break-before, so it should always start at the top of a fresh page
Section 5 with page-break-inside: avoid should try to keep its content on a single page
Section 6 has another page-break-before, so it should start on its own page
Section 7's page-break-after should push Section 8 to the start of the final page
Section 8 'Final Content' should appear at the top of the last page
The PDF should span at least 3 pages due to the explicit page breaks
